case_number: Crl. Bail Appln. No. S-200 of 2025

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 980 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For hearing of pre-arrest bail 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of pre-arrest bail 22.12.2025 Mr. Ghulam Abbas Shah, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Khalil Ahmed Maitlo, Deputy Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Applicant is present on interim pre-arrest bail. Notices on complainant are reported served; however, the complainant is called absent. Learned DPG points out that at page 45, order dated 04.09.2025 is present, wherein Crl. Bail Appln. No. S-200 of 2025 was disposed of converting the earlier pre-arrest bail application into protective bail at the request of the applicant, and five days’ time was granted for the applicant to appear before the concerned Court. Learned Counsel for the applicant is unable to show any subsequent order thereafter. The present pre-arrest bail application is found not liable to be maintainable and is accordingly dismissed. Interim bail order dated 08.10.2025 stands withdrawn. The bail application stands disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E Abdul Basit
